name: button
description: A token-styled button (or link styled as a button) with Filament-grade height-based sizing (sm/md/lg, shadcn h-9 baseline) that aligns to the form controls in a toolbar, an iconOnly square mode for icon actions, and primary/secondary/destructive/destructive-outline/destructive-ghost/ghost/outline variants (the two destructive-* are the red-but-not-solid actions) with shadcn hover + aria-invalid ring states. Net-new (v-next): loading=true shows an inline spinner, sets aria-busy=true, and blocks activation (dims + inert) without the permanent 'not available' semantic of disabled. The click is wired by the consuming wire template via l:click; the partial renders only the styled control. Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the button partial to your JTE root at lievit/button.jte, reached as @template.lievit.button(variant=..., size=..., content=@`...`). size is height-based (sm=h-8/32px, md=h-9/36px the shadcn baseline, lg=h-10/40px) so a button sits flush next to a form control in a toolbar; set iconOnly=true (with ariaLabel) for a square icon-only action button. Set loading=true to show an inline spinner, set aria-busy=true, and block activation: the button dims + becomes inert while a wire action is in flight, without the permanent 'not available' semantic of disabled. Wire a per-row action SAFELY with wireClick="revokeDevice" (emitted as l:click="...", escaped) plus wireArgs=Map.of("id", row.id()) (escaped data-* the handler reads) -- no hand-rolled button in a reactive list. Or pass href to render a real link. Extra attributes go through two channels by trust: attrs is a TRUSTED raw string ($unsafe, static author-typed strings ONLY -- wire directives, target/rel) and dataAttrs is a SAFE Map<String,String> of dynamic data-* attributes whose values are HTML-escaped (the only safe way to carry user/DB-derived data; keys are the data-attribute name without the data- prefix, simple identifiers; wireArgs merge into this escaped channel). The source is yours: edit freely.
